blended.narrative: Stevens Pass is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.4 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,355 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 36.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 29" over the past week. Current depth: 62".
